text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP allows machines to grasp meaning, context, and even emotion. For example, NLP powers translation tools that can convert text from one language to another while keeping the original meaning. It also enables sentiment analysis, which identifies whether a piece of writing is positive, negative, or neutral. You might have also used chatbots that answer questions or provide customer support. These systems rely on NLP to interpret what you type and respond in a helpful, natural way.
